query:
DELETE a1 FROM assets a1
INNER JOIN assets a2 ON a1.companyId = a2.companyId AND a1.assetName = a2.assetName AND a1.id < a2.id
WHERE a1.companyId IN (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name = 'CSX')
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ovDZf4AdgM1wjio.bac7ad92b374 --database Rur7xAEUjvByHVg3PaP3cz --execute DELETE a1 FROM assets a1
INNER JOIN assets a2 ON a1.companyId = a2.companyId AND a1.assetName = a2.assetName AND a1.id < a2.id
WHERE a1.companyId IN (SELECT id FROM companies WHERE name = 'CSX')
